items.title: Critical vulnerability in Amasty extension leading to Remote Code Execution
items.summary: Sansec reported a critical vulnerability in one of 25 Amasty extensions that were patched, which could lead to remote code execution. Sansec Shield already blocks the critical issues.

items.title: Unauthenticated arbitrary file upload in Amasty Order Attributes for Magento
items.summary: An unauthenticated arbitrary file upload flaw in Amasty Order Attributes allows attackers to write executable files to a Magento store without logging in, potentially leading to remote code execution.

items.title: Unauthenticated PHP object injection in Mirasvit Cache Warmer for Magento
items.summary: Sansec discovered a critical unauthenticated PHP object injection vulnerability in Mirasvit Cache Warmer, a popular Magento extension, allowing remote code execution via a crafted cookie. The flaw is actively exploited and CISA has added it to its KEV catalog.

items.title: Security update available for Adobe Commerce
items.summary: Adobe released a security update addressing multiple critical, important, and moderate vulnerabilities in Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source, including arbitrary code execution, arbitrary file system write, application denial-of-service, and security feature bypass.

items.title: Incorrect Authorization vulnerability in Adobe Commerce
items.summary: This vulnerability, part of APSB26-49, allows a remote, unauthenticated attacker to bypass security checks and gain unauthorized write access to the affected application. It has a CVSS score of 7.5.

items.title: Unrestricted file upload in Magento and Adobe Commerce REST API
items.summary: Sansec discovered PolyShell, a critical flaw in Magento's REST API that enables unauthenticated attackers to upload executable files to any store by disguising code as an image. While Magento 2.4.9 contains a fix, older supported versions remain vulnerable.

items.title: Critical Security Update for Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source
items.summary: Adobe released a critical security update for Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source to protect against multiple vulnerabilities that could allow attackers to bypass security controls, gain escalated privileges, and execute unauthorized malicious code.
